description: Classify the support ticket text into one of the predefined categories using LLM semantic analysis
task_description:
Classify this support ticket into one of these categories:
- billing
- technical
- account
- general

Ticket:
I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.

Return only the category name.

**IMPORTANT: The task provides these input variables:**
- `ticket_text` (str)

Your workflow MUST use these exact variable names: ticket_text

**CRITICAL - OUTPUT FORMAT (EXACT STRUCTURE REQUIRED):**
Your activity must return this structure:
```json
billing
```

**Rules:**
- Match this structure (field names, nesting, types) EXACTLY
- Values will vary by instance, but structure stays the same
- Do NOT add extra fields
- Do NOT change field names

inputs.name: ticket_text
inputs.description: The complete support ticket text containing the customer's request or issue description

inputs.name: categories
inputs.description: List of possible category classifications: billing, technical, account, general

output.description: The single category classification result as a string, representing which of the four support categories (billing, technical, account, or general) best matches the ticket content

workflow_spec.name: Support Ticket Categorization
workflow_spec.description: Classify a support ticket into one of four predefined categories: billing, technical, account, or general. Returns only the category name as a string.
